1.0.0.1: Populated lists with 50% of valid runs.
1.0.0.2: Added run counts to the status bar.
1.0.0.3: Populated lists with 100% of valid runs.
1.0.0.4: Fixed missing image links for SMB1, Legend of Zelda: BOTW, Turnip Boy Commits Tax Evasion, Sekiro: Shadows Die Twice, and others.
1.0.0.5: Adjusted backend variable names for better readability.
Updated URL sub-headers to only display speedrun.com links (if available).
Added video links for runs (if available).
1.0.0.5a: Fixed video links not being clickable.
1.0.0.6: Optimized load time by fetching all run data in parallel, then rendering the UI immediately, and fetching cover images in parallel after the UI appears.
1.0.0.7: Fixed non-speedrun.com links not loading as game icons.
1.0.0.8: Pushed a hotfix to help rate limits.
1.0.0.9: Added local caching and extra rate limit protection.
1.0.0.10: Added 95% of videos to run entries.
1.0.0.11: Added support for markdown links in rules and notes.
